exemplar.title: How does John Fowles employ intertextuality in his novel The Collector to expose the corrupting effects of material wealth on Clegg and Mirandaâs relationship?

detailedExemplarData.title: How does John Fowles employ intertextuality in his novel The Collector to expose the corrupting effects of material wealth on Clegg and Mirandaâs relationship?

subject.title: English Lang & Lit (Old)
subject.description: IB English Language & Literature combines the study of language and literature, analyzing both literary and non-literary texts across various media and contexts. Students explore how language shapes meaning, identity, and culture through critical examination of diverse text types including advertisements, speeches, novels, and digital media. The course develops analytical skills, cultural understanding, and critical thinking about communication in different contexts and purposes.

strengths: Secure, sustained interpretation of thematic implications across the essay
Frequent, relevant and usually well-chosen quotations from The Collector, The Tempest and Beauty and the Beast
Accurate recall of contextual issues (1960s social mobility) linked effectively to the research question
Comprehensive Works Cited list demonstrating careful research practice
weaknesses: Occasional reliance on secondary-source assertions rather than the studentâs original analysis
Minor mis-formatted footnote markers interrupt textual support
A handful of paraphrases lack clear attribution
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay consistently demonstrates good knowledge and understanding, with persuasive interpretations of how wealth fosters entitlement and how intertextual parallels destabilise power. References and quotations are relevant and support ideas effectively, but occasional over-dependence on secondary sources and small citation lapses prevent a band 5 award. A band 4 allocation accurately reflects strong but not flawless performance in this criterion.

strengths: Appropriate and at times insightful analysis of diction, syntax and symbolism
Nuanced interpretation of power dynamics through intertextual parallels with Beauty and the Beast
Clear conceptual engagement with reader response (unease, irony)
Effective evaluation of authorial choices such as the adverb âevenâ and elliptical syntax
weaknesses: Some analytical claims (e.g. semantic field of domesticity) remain asserted rather than fully explored
Counter-readings and alternative interpretations are only briefly touched on
Insightful points are not consistently sustained throughout the essay
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs essay moves beyond description and offers appropriate, sometimes insightful analysis of textual features and authorial choices, placing it firmly in band 4. The occasional lack of deeper exploration and only tentative counter-reading discussion mean it does not meet the fully convincing, consistently insightful standard required for band 5.

strengths: Clear and focused introduction with a well-articulated research question guiding the line of inquiry
Logical organization into three thematic body sections with effective transitional markers
Supporting examples mostly well integrated into sentences and paragraphs
Concise conclusion that synthesizes the essayâs arguments and revisits the thesis
weaknesses: Paragraphing is occasionally uneven, with some long blocks combining multiple ideas
Use of question headers interrupts formal cohesion; combining them could enhance readability
Minor introduction of new analytical points in the conclusion rather than summarizing only
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The essay demonstrates exceptionally strong organizational control and development of ideas. Its introduction, thematic structure and conclusion work cohesively to advance the central argument. Although minor unevenness in paragraphing and structural headers prevents flawless band 5 performance, the overall cohesion and development justify awarding the maximum mark for this criterion.

strengths: Clear, varied prose with largely accurate complex sentence construction
Appropriate scholarly register and academic vocabulary throughout
Correct use of MLA-style Works Cited and formal academic tone
Minor errors do not impede overall clarity
weaknesses: Occasional agreement slips and missing articles reveal lapses in accuracy
Redundant informal phrasings (e.g. âindeed,â âin factâ) detract from stylistic precision
Inconsistent footnote formatting and citation punctuation require standardization
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The language is consistently clear with good accuracy in grammar, vocabulary and register, placing it in band 4. Minor lapses in agreement, occasional informal redundancy and citation style inconsistencies prevent the near-flawless precision expected for a band 5, so a band 4 mark accurately reflects performance in this criterion.

strandSelections.reasoning: Most quotations are **incorporated syntactically into the studentâs sentences** and followed by comment.  Footnote citation occasionally interrupts flow, but examples rarely appear as stand-alone fragments.  Isolated lapses (e.g. a quote followed by extended paraphrase without analysis) prevent the perfect smoothness required for band 5, yet the integration is generally skilful and supports argument effectively, satisfying band 4.

The student demonstrates **secure familiarity with The Collector as well as the two core intertexts (The Tempest and Beauty and the Beast)**. Key plot points, thematic concerns and contextual issues (1960s social mobility) are recalled accurately and repeatedly linked to the research question.  Interpretation of implications â for example the way wealth âfosters a false sense of entitlementâ or how intertextual parallels destabilise power â is developed in every paragraph and sustained across the whole essay.  However, explanations occasionally rely on secondary-source assertion (e.g. âformal-ist interpretationâ¦ traditional interpretationâ¦â) without fully integrating the studentâs own voice, so the reading is persuasive but not consistently original enough for the âexcellentâ descriptor.

The student presents a clear introduction, three thematic body sections and a concise conclusion that revisit the thesis, showing **good organisational control**. Logical topic sentences and transitional phrases (âFirstlyâ¦ Furthermoreâ¦ Lastlyâ¦â) guide the reader, and the central line of inquiryâhow intertextuality exposes corruptionâis maintained.  Some paragraphing is uneven (a few long blocks combine multiple claims), so cohesion is strong but not seamless, aligning with the âwell organised and mostly cohesiveâ descriptor.

Quotations from Fowles, Shakespeare and the fairy-tale are **frequent, relevant and usually well chosen**; they illustrate each analytical claim effectively.  Secondary references are cited, and a Works Cited list is included, showing careful research practice.  Minor weaknessesâoccasional mis-formatted footnote markers and a handful of unattributed paraphrasesâmean the textual support is strong rather than flawless, fitting the ârelevant and support the candidateâs ideas effectivelyâ level rather than the âwell-chosen and *perfectly* integratedâ level of band 5.

The essay maintains an **appropriate scholarly register**âimpersonal voice, academic verbs (âelucidates,â âunderscoresâ), and correct terminology for literary analysis.  Footnotes and MLA-style Works Cited support formality.  A few informal phrasings (âindeed,â âin factâ used redundantly) keep the style from being fully elegant, so the work meets âconsistently appropriateâ rather than the âeffective and exemplaryâ standard of band 5.

The prose is **clear, varied and largely accurate**. Complex sentences are handled competently, vocabulary is academic (âentrenching,â âelliptical syntaxâ), and errors are minor (occasional agreement slips, missing article).  These infrequent lapses do not impede meaning but reveal that accuracy is not of the ânear-flawlessâ calibre expected for band 5.

The essay moves beyond description, offering **appropriate and at times insightful analysis** of diction (e.g. the weight of the adverb âevenâ), syntax, symbolism and intertextual echoes.  Evaluation of how these choices shape reader response (unease, irony) is present, showing conceptual engagement.  Yet the insight is not fully *consistent*: some claims (e.g. semantic field of domesticity âhouse, married, kidsâ) remain asserted rather than explored, and counter-readings are touched on only briefly.  This places the work solidly in band 4 rather than the âconsistently insightful and convincingâ expectations of band 5.

annotations.comment: The title is prominently displayed and sets a clear scholarly tone, establishing strong organization from the outset.
The research question is clearly articulated and focused, guiding the essayâs line of inquiry effectively.
The introduction occasionally relies on secondary-source assertions; integrate more original analysis to strengthen the essayâs argument authenticity.
The student adeptly analyzes Fowlesâs diction and tense choices, showing clear engagement with textual features.
The analysis of the intertextual alter ego provides insightful connections to The Tempest, but some assertions lack deeper exploration of alternative interpretations.
The concluding sentence of this section clearly reiterates the main claim, providing cohesive transition to the next idea.
Strong vocabulary such as âgraduallyâ and âevolvedâ enhances the analysis of Cleggâs transformation.
The exploration of the semantic field of domesticity is thorough, though the essay would benefit from examining its emotional impact on the reader.
The topic sentence signals a shift in focus effectively, but previewing specific analytical points could strengthen coherence.
Consider combining the question headers into a single cohesive line to enhance readability and maintain formal style.
The introduction effectively contextualizes Fowlesâs The Collector and outlines the essayâs thesis within both literary and historical frameworks.
The footnote markers interrupt the reading flow; integrate citations more seamlessly or use in-text citations per MLA style.
The shift to allegorical symbolism in this paragraph effectively reinforces the essayâs central thesis.
The Works Cited list demonstrates comprehensive research and appropriate source variety.
Clarify the note on reference numbering, as it may confuse readers; consider standardizing citation notes.
The URL citation lacks italics for the title and requires proper punctuation to conform to MLA guidelines.
Ensure all titles in the Works Cited are consistently italicized to maintain formal academic style.
This section presents a nuanced interpretation of power dynamics through intertextual parallels with Beauty and the Beast.
Consider unpacking the sexual connotation of âmistressâ further to deepen the argument on gender and power.
The analysis of linguistic devices such as elliptical syntax is insightful but would be more convincing with a counter-reading exploration.
The footnote formatting appears inconsistent here; align superscript markers with MLA style to maintain professionalism.
This paragraph is rich in examples, but sentence length occasionally impedes clarity; consider shortening complex sentences.
Some paraphrased scholarly interpretations lack clear attribution; ensure each paraphrase is properly cited.
The conclusion aptly synthesizes the essayâs arguments, reiterating the tragic consequences of materialism.
Avoid introducing new analysis in the conclusion; focus on summarizing key points to maintain coherence.
